closed_world.value: Unitah, Utah - a mysterious small town where strange phenomena occur
closed_world.quote: I now live in Unitah, Utah. This is one of the most mysterious places in America.

investigator.value: Jen Connors, 16-year-old new student interested in investigating mysterious phenomena
investigator.quote: My name is Jen Connors... Mysterious things intrigue me. They always have.

red_herring.value: Railroad sounds and mutations presented as supernatural phenomena may be misdirection from actual mystery
red_herring.quote: railroad sounds that you can hear under the ground when nothing is there and the crazy mutations

social_world.value: High school social hierarchy with established relationships and newcomer integration dynamics
social_world.quote: He's a bit of a tough guy but deep down he's actually really nice

reveal_mechanic.value: Invisible ink recipe discovery suggests hidden information will be revealed through chemical means
reveal_mechanic.quote: I found this recipe online on how to make invisible ink

media_and_audience.value: Local folklore and reputation frame Unitah as mysterious place with supernatural occurrences
media_and_audience.quote: This is one of the most mysterious places in America

investigator_wound.value: Protagonist's displacement and need to belong drives investigation into dangerous local mysteries
investigator_wound.quote: Mysterious things intrigue me. They always have.
